- Class45 equiv hasVisualFeature(orange/reddish-orange clustered small flowers with veined elongated petals) and hasVisualFeature(green narrow foliage)

</tbox>

- hasVisualFeature(Target, orange/reddish-orange clustered small flowers with veined elongated petals)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, green narrow foliage background)
</abox>

These ABox assertions exactly match the necessary and sufficient conditions for Class45 derived from the training examples, so 45 is the correct classification.
</dl_explanation>
<response>45</response>
